name: Baseline-004: hash-seeded random class
description: Hash-seeded uniform pick from the four classes (folklore, pseudoscience, factual-error, truth), deterministic per question text via SHA-256. Random-but-stable: same input → same output (CI-reproducible), but the underlying signal is noise. Exists to anchor the leaderboard at chance performance and to demonstrate the gauntlet correctly handles methods with some-signal-by-luck but no real classification ability.
